one_liner: PLANTED: inpatient admission denial based on an internal screening tool where the two-midnight benchmark governs

service.description: Inpatient admission for high-risk TIA workup

clinical_summary: 76M with transient ischemic attack, ABCD2 score 6 (high risk), new atrial fibrillation on ECG. Admitting clinician documents expectation of care spanning at least two midnights: telemetry, MRI/MRA, anticoagulation initiation with monitoring, and swallow evaluation.

draft_decision.rationale: Case scored 'observation appropriate' on the plan's inpatient screening tool; TIA pathway defaults to observation per tool output.
draft_decision.specific_reason: The plan's screening tool assessed this stay as appropriate for observation level of care rather than inpatient admission.
